page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r8y.4xlarge is a memory-optimized instance powered by the custom ARM64-based Alibaba Yitian 710 processor. Operating at a clock speed of 2.75 GHz, this instance features 16 dedicated physical cores with a single thread per core, eliminating hyperthreading overhead. It is equipped with 128 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8 GB per core. The processor includes 64 KB of L1d cache, 1.0 MB of L2 cache, and 64 MB of L3 cache. There is no local storage or GPU acceleration bundled with this instance, and it relies on a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks position this instance in the average tier for most compute and memory tasks. The stress-ng single-core CPU performance is recorded at 1818.39, while multi-core performance reaches 28967.52. Memory bandwidth tests show a read-only small block cached speed of 1639.97 GB/sec, which drops to 80.38 GB/sec for uncached large blocks, alongside a write speed of 40.44 GB/sec. In database-related workloads, the instance achieves 14714.33 operations in Passmark database tests and processes 25.52 million operations per second in Redis SET benchmarks. However, cryptography performance is relatively weak, with the Passmark CPU encryption test scoring 2615.37.

This hardware profile offers qualitative cost efficiency for memory-intensive workloads that benefit from dedicated ARM64 cores without hyperthreading. The absence of local storage and GPUs makes it a specialized choice for memory-bound applications rather than storage-heavy or accelerated computing tasks. It is well-suited for database operations, Redis caching, static web serving, and lightweight language model inference.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r8y.4xlarge is an ARM64 memory-optimized instance powered by a 16-core Alibaba Yitian 710 processor running at 2.75 GHz. It features 128 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8 GB per core, with no local storage or GPU acceleration. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, it provides a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps. Benchmark results indicate average performance across most categories, including a multi-core stress-ng score of 28967.52 and a Redis SET throughput of 25.52 million operations per second, though cryptographic performance is relatively weak. This instance offers qualitative cost efficiency for memory-intensive workloads that do not require local storage, making it suitable for database operations, caching layers, and static web serving.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r8y.4xlarge is an ARM64 memory-optimized instance featuring 16 dedicated Alibaba Yitian 710 cores, 128 GB of RAM, and a 10 Gbps network baseline, optimized for database and caching workloads.

tagline: An ARM64 memory-optimized instance featuring dedicated physical cores and high memory density for database and caching workloads.
bullet_points: 16 dedicated physical ARM64 cores powered by the Alibaba Yitian 710 processor
128 GB of RAM providing a high 8 GB per core memory-to-CPU ratio
10 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with no local storage or GPU
Average database performance with 25.52 million Redis SET operations per second
Optimal for memory-bound workloads, database operations, and caching layers
